purpose: Initializes the program by accepting current date values and opening input files INFILE1 and INFILE2, setting up file status flags.
Reads a record from INFILE1 and moves it to the pending authorization summary if successful, or sets end-of-file flag if no more records.
Reads a record from INFILE2, validates the root segment key, and populates child segment data for insertion if valid, or sets end-of-file flag.
Closes both INFILE1 and INFILE2 and displays error messages if either file fails to close.
Terminates the program abnormally by setting RETURN-CODE to 16 and displaying an abend message.
Abends the program with return code 16 when an input file fails to open.
Inserts a root segment into the IMS database using data read from INFILE1.
Abends the program if the root segment insertion into IMS fails with an unexpected status code.
Inserts a child segment into the IMS database after setting up the qualifying SSA with the root key.
Performs an IMS insert call to add a child segment after successfully retrieving the parent root segment.
Abends the program with return code 16 when a root GU call fails.
Abends the program with return code 16 when an insert call for a child segment fails.
